abilities.description: You may cast target instant or sorcery card from an opponent's graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into their graveyard, exile it instead.

effect.description: You may cast target instant or sorcery card from an opponent's graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into their graveyard, exile it instead.
effect.name: Play

abilities.target_prompt: Choose target instant or sorcery card from an opponent's graveyard
